title: Rhapsody on the Red Cliff
description: Su Shi's meditation on impermanence while boating at night on the Yangtze — one of the greatest prose poems in Chinese.
introduction: Su Shi's meditation on impermanence while boating at night on the Yangtze — one of the greatest prose poems in Chinese.

translation.text: The breeze over the river and the moon between the mountains — the ear receives it as sound, the eye meets it as color. There is no prohibition against taking them, and no end to enjoying them.
